summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 features: 1) Atomic counter for preventivi numbering (BUG FIX), 2) Atomic counter for invoice numbering (BUG FIX), 3) Scadenziario Automatico feature with auto-generated payment deadlines. All backend APIs tested successfully via curl. Frontend ScadenziarioPage tested with Playwright - all 6 KPI cards visible, 'incasso' filter option present, and incasso entries displayed with Banknote icon.

bug_fix_preventivi_counter.POST /api/preventivi/: PASS - Creates PRV-YYYY-NNNN with atomic counter
bug_fix_preventivi_counter.Counter after delete: PASS - Deleting PRV-2026-0001 does not cause reuse, next is PRV-2026-0003
bug_fix_preventivi_counter.Counter collection: PASS - Uses document_counters with counter_id format PRV-{user_id}-{year}

bug_fix_invoice_counter.POST /api/invoices/from-preventivo/: PASS - Creates FT-YYYY/NNNN with atomic counter
bug_fix_invoice_counter.Counter collection: PASS - Uses document_counters with counter_id format FT-{user_id}-{year}

feature_scadenziario_automatico.POST /api/invoices/{id}/scadenze/genera: PASS - Generates payment deadlines from client payment_type
feature_scadenziario_automatico.Auto-generate on status emessa: PASS - Changing status to 'emessa' auto-triggers generate_scadenze_pagamento()
feature_scadenziario_automatico.Payment deadline calculation: PASS - Correctly calculates dates using quote[].giorni from payment_type

feature_dashboard_incassi.KPI incassi_scaduti: PASS - Includes sum of overdue incassi
feature_dashboard_incassi.KPI incassi_mese_corrente: PASS - Includes sum of current month incassi

frontend_scadenziario_page.6 KPI Cards: PASS - Da Pagare (Scaduti), Da Pagare (Mese), Incassi Scaduti, Incassi Mese, Acquisti Anno, Da Processare
frontend_scadenziario_page.Incasso entries display: PASS - Shows with Banknote icon and blue color
frontend_scadenziario_page.data-testid attributes: PASS - All KPI cards have proper test IDs (kpi-scaduti, kpi-mese, kpi-incassi-scaduti, kpi-incassi-mese, kpi-anno, kpi-inbox)

test_credentials: Created test session test_session_iter106_1772479838726 (cleaned up after tests)
seed_data_creation: None required - tests create and cleanup own data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three features fully implemented and tested: 1) Atomic counter for preventivi (PRV-YYYY-NNNN) using document_counters collection with find_one_and_update + seed from max existing. 2) Same atomic counter pattern for invoices (FT-YYYY/NNNN). 3) Scadenziario Automatico - generate_scadenze_pagamento() calculates deadlines from client's payment_type quote array, auto-triggered on status 'emessa'. Frontend ScadenziarioPage has 6 KPI cards and 'incasso' filter type with Banknote icon.
